reasoning: The Manifold market assigned a 4% probability to this event on May 15, 2025. Reviewing the evidence, there are no imminent indications that a system capable of performing *any* intellectual task a human can will be created and explicitly announced by January 1, 2026. While Sam Altman stirred some hype in late 2024 about being "excited" for 2025, he later clarified to Bloomberg in January 2025 that 2025 was "a totally random number" based on 10 years from OpenAI's founding. Other prominent industry leaders, like Anthropic's Dario Amodei and Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis, foresee AGI arriving in the 2026-2027+ timeframe or early 2030s. Even if OpenAI releases their next major frontier model (e.g. GPT-5 or similar) later this year, it is highly unlikely to meet this strict operational definition of AGI (performing *any* intellectual task a human can) and be publicly announced as such. A probability of 4-5% accurately reflects this consensus timeline.
